content_of_post_to_comment: There’s only so much of the “they had a hard upbringing” excuse I can take. So according to that logic, I’m supposed to go around lashing out at everyone because life was rough on me? What about me, bro? No. Because people know exactly what they’re doing more often than we like to admit. Pain explains things. It doesn’t excuse everything. At some point, we have to stop pretending that every bad behavior deserves endless understanding. Some of us had it rough too and still chose not to become a problem for everyone around us. So stop making excuses for people and their bullshit. Common sense isn’t that common.
